_comment: Build 284 NEGATIVE fixture. Fake/sanitized Vapi End Of Call Report (PSTN) for a mapped clean Vapi number where the homeowner only requested a phone CALLBACK — no in-person site visit was booked. It deliberately contains an explicit calendar date and clock time ('July 2nd at 2 PM') AND booking-ish language ('scheduled'), but the scheduled thing is a CALLBACK / phone call, with NO appointment noun (no site visit / appointment / inspection / visit) anywhere in the summary or transcript. The Build 284 fallback requires an appointment noun, so this must NOT create a booking: appointment_booked stays false, appointment_time stays null, booking_id=null. Proves the fallback does not over-book from callback-only conversations even when a confident-sounding date and time are present. Reserved fictional 555-01xx numbers only; no real PII, no real clean Vapi number, no real UUID/call-id.

message.transcript: AI: Thanks for calling, roofing services, how can I help? Homeowner: I'm just gathering info, can someone call me back later? AI: Of course, I'll have someone give you a callback. Homeowner: Maybe try July 2nd around 2 PM. AI: Sure, we'll aim to call you back then.
message.summary: Homeowner requested a phone callback only. A callback was scheduled for July 2nd at 2 PM.

analysis.successEvaluation: Homeowner requested a callback only; nothing in person was booked.
